name: predge-whale-data
description: Outcome-verified Polymarket whale intelligence, pay-per-call over x402.
long_description: 16 tools (1 free discovery + 15 paid). Wallets ranked by outcome-verified win rate on RESOLVED markets (edge over market price x capital), smart-money consensus from proven winners, and a flagship /v1/attest that returns each settled market outcome as a cryptographically signed ed25519 receipt, verifiable offline. Pay-per-call over x402 (USDC on Base) - no accounts, no signup. You bring your OWN funded Base-mainnet key; it stays on this machine and never leaves.

buyer_private_key.title: Buyer private key
buyer_private_key.description: A funded Base-mainnet EVM private key (0x...) used to sign USDC micropayments per paid call. Stays on your machine. Leave empty to use only the free discovery tool.

max_price_usd.title: Max price per call (USD)
max_price_usd.description: Refuse any call priced above this (USD) before money moves.
